name: dte-skills
description: dte-* orchestration skills that compose the existing toolchain (Augment context retrieval, intent-engineering, compound-engineering, layered-rails, majestic, ponytail, cubic, MemPalace) for architectural review, planning, deep review, test-quality audit, the full review-plan-work-review cycle, tooling scans, autonomous gated loops, UX/front-end, full-stack features, performance, specs, security sweeps, debugging, and migrations. Each skill can loop over a list of targets.
